text: Can you review this pull request? The changes modify the authentication middleware to support OAuth2 refresh tokens. I want to make sure the token rotation logic is correct and doesn't introduce any race conditions.
label: benign

text:
Subject: Re: Quarterly Planning

Hi Sarah,

Thanks for sending the roadmap draft. I have a few thoughts on the timeline for the infrastructure migration. Could we push the database cutover to week 3 instead of week 2? The team needs more time for integration testing.

Best,
Mark
label: benign

text:
## Deploying to Production

Before deploying, ensure the following checklist is complete:

- [ ] All unit tests passing
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] Version bumped in package.json

Run `npm run deploy:prod` to initiate the deployment pipeline.
label: benign

text: To make a classic French omelette: Beat 3 eggs with a fork until just combined. Heat butter in a nonstick pan over medium-high heat. Pour in eggs and stir with a chopstick for 30 seconds. When edges set, tilt pan and roll the omelette onto a warm plate. Season with flaky salt.
label: benign

text: The transformer architecture, introduced in 'Attention Is All You Need' by Vaswani et al. (2017), uses self-attention mechanisms to process input sequences in parallel rather than sequentially. This allows for much faster training compared to recurrent neural networks while maintaining the ability to capture long-range dependencies.
label: benign
